name: Gypsy Water
description: A smoky, earthy unisex scent with bright citrus opening into a pine-campfire warmth, great for relaxed everyday wear.
brandDesc: Byredo blends modern contrasts like citrus, incense, and woods into wearable, conceptual perfumes.

name: Eleventh Hour
description: Warm, boozy amber with dried-fruit sweetness and soft woods, ideal for cold evenings and close-to-skin occasions.
brandDesc: Byredo uses warm resins, incense, and subtle sweetness in its amber compositions.

name: Mixed Emotions
description: Dry, inky tea and woods with a subtle fruitiness, wearing like a contemplative, quiet veil perfect for workdays.
brandDesc: Byredo experiments with tea, ink, and smoke notes to create conceptual yet wearable perfumes.

name: Bal d'Afrique
description: A sunlit, slightly sweet floral with sparkling citrus and soft vetiver, great for warm days and joyful casual wear.
brandDesc: Byredo’s florals often pair bright citruses with musky, woody bases for a luminous, modern feel.

name: Blanche
description: A clean, laundry-fresh floral with soft rose and creamy sandalwood, ideal for office days and low-key settings.
brandDesc: Byredo uses aldehydes and soft florals to create abstract, fresh fragrances that feel like clean fabric.

name: Sunday Cologne
description: Bright, clean citrus opening with a hint of floral and a soft musky base, perfect for warm-weather casual wear.
brandDesc: Byredo’s citrus line keeps things fresh and modern, often with a subtle floral or musky finish.

name: Tierra del Fuego
description: A smoky amber with sharp pink pepper and cypress, evoking windswept southern forests and distant fires.
brandDesc: Fueguia 1833 crafts botanical perfumes inspired by South American landscapes, using minimal note pyramids and natural materials.

name: Darwin
description: Bright grapefruit and airy jasmine drift into a crisp vetiver base, reminiscent of botanical exploration.
brandDesc: Fueguia 1833 perfumes often reference explorers, landscapes, and plants from Latin America.

name: La Cautiva
description: A lush tuberose balanced by dark currant and soft sandalwood, rich but airy.
brandDesc: Fueguia’s florals emphasize natural botanicals and elegant minimalism.

name: Ballena de la Pampa
description: A salty, musky ambergris scent inspired by whales drifting along the Patagonian coast.
brandDesc: Fueguia often incorporates marine, forest, and botanical inspirations from South American ecosystems.

name: OroNardo
description: Radiant tuberose wrapped in creamy sandalwood and citrus blossom, rich yet elegant.
brandDesc: Xinú is a Mexican perfume house focused on botanical ingredients native to the Americas.

name: Copála
description: Sacred copal resin smoke with glowing amber warmth, reminiscent of ceremonial incense.
brandDesc: Xinú highlights indigenous resins, woods, and plants with sculptural bottles and modern perfumery.

name: Aguamadera
description: A transparent citrus-wood scent with smooth guaiac and cedar warmth.
brandDesc: Xinú fragrances often combine citrus brightness with warm woods and resins.

name: Montecisto
description: Green fig leaves and herbs over soft moss, evoking tropical gardens.
brandDesc: Xinú fragrances emphasize lush greenery and natural plant accords.

name: Tam Dao
description: Creamy sandalwood and cypress recalling sacred forests in Vietnam.
brandDesc: Diptyque blends French perfumery with travel memories, natural materials, and artistic storytelling.

name: Philosykos
description: Green fig leaves and creamy fig milk over dry woods, fresh and Mediterranean.
brandDesc: Diptyque scents often recreate natural landscapes like fig groves or gardens.

name: Do Son
description: Airy tuberose with orange blossom and soft musk inspired by seaside gardens.
brandDesc: Diptyque’s florals balance richness with transparency and air.

name: Eau Duelle
description: Spicy vanilla wrapped in incense and amber warmth.
brandDesc: Diptyque gourmands emphasize spice and woods rather than sugary sweetness.

name: L'Ombre Dans L'Eau
description: Green currant leaves and romantic rose with earthy moss.
brandDesc: Diptyque is famous for poetic, nature-driven compositions.

name: I Don't Know What
description: A transparent woody enhancer designed to amplify other fragrances.
brandDesc: D.S. & Durga is a Brooklyn perfume house known for storytelling fragrances inspired by music, landscapes, and Americana.

name: Debaser
description: Milky fig and green leaves with creamy coconut warmth.
brandDesc: D.S. & Durga fragrances often channel indie music and cultural references.

name: Burning Barbershop
description: A smoky barbershop scent blending mint, lavender, and caramelized vanilla.
brandDesc: D.S. & Durga excels at conceptual scents with vivid narrative themes.

name: Bowmakers
description: Resinous woods evoking violin workshops and polished instruments.
brandDesc: D.S. & Durga’s woody scents often recreate artisanal environments.

name: Santal 33
description: A smoky sandalwood and leather scent softened by iris and violet, iconic and instantly recognizable.
brandDesc: Le Labo creates hand-blended perfumes centered on a single star ingredient, paired with raw woods, musks, and spices.

name: Bergamote 22
description: Bright bergamot and grapefruit balanced with soft woods and musk, sparkling yet refined.
brandDesc: Le Labo fragrances often contrast bright citrus openings with musky, woody bases.

name: Another 13
description: A clean, musky skin scent with subtle fruit and soft amber, minimal and addictive.
brandDesc: Le Labo frequently uses modern aroma-molecules to create abstract skin-like fragrances.

name: Thé Noir 29
description: Dark tea and fig layered over tobacco and woods, moody and slightly sweet.
brandDesc: Le Labo blends botanical inspirations with modern woods and musks.

name: Rose 31
description: A spicy rose with cumin and woods that transforms the floral into something smoky and unisex.
brandDesc: Le Labo often reinterprets classic perfume notes in unconventional ways.

name: Vetiver 46
description: Dark, smoky vetiver with incense and woods, powerful and brooding.
brandDesc: Le Labo’s darker compositions emphasize resins, smoke, and deep woods.

name: Tonka 25
description: Soft tonka and vanilla wrapped in amber warmth, cozy and slightly powdery.
brandDesc: Le Labo’s amber scents combine sweetness with musks and smoky woods.

name: Lys 41
description: A lush white floral bouquet with creamy vanilla warmth.
brandDesc: Le Labo florals are bold, often mixing several blossoms with musky warmth.

name: Hwyl
description: A smoky forest scent inspired by Japanese hinoki woods and temple incense.
brandDesc: Aesop fragrances reflect the brand’s botanical philosophy, blending woods, herbs, and resins with quiet elegance.

name: Tacit
description: A crisp citrus-herbal scent with basil and yuzu over clean woods.
brandDesc: Aesop uses aromatic herbs and citrus to create fresh, intellectual compositions.

name: Marrakech Intense
description: Warm spices and florals over sandalwood and patchouli, inspired by Moroccan markets.
brandDesc: Aesop perfumes often draw on global landscapes and natural raw materials.

name: Karst
description: Mineral, herbaceous freshness with crisp juniper and dry woods.
brandDesc: Aesop compositions emphasize clean botanicals and textured woods.

name: Eremia
description: Soft green tea and citrus over musky woods, evoking quiet urban nature.
brandDesc: Aesop explores contrasts between urban life and natural landscapes.

name: Rōzu
description: A woody rose accented by shiso and spices, elegant and architectural.
brandDesc: Aesop fragrances often combine florals with unusual herbal or woody contrasts.

name: Gloam
description: A dusky floral with powdery iris and warm cocoa undertones.
brandDesc: Aesop blends florals and spices to create atmospheric evening scents.

name: Miraceti
description: A deep resinous amber inspired by maritime trade and spice routes.
brandDesc: Aesop’s richer fragrances explore resins, spices, and maritime inspiration.
